name: Potato and Green Bean Salad with Citrus Miso Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon sherry vinegar or umeboshi vinegar
1/2 cup fresh parsley leaves, washed and dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim green beans and cut into 1 1/2-inch pieces.
Cut potatoes into 3/4-inch wedges.
2. Steam potatoes until just tender, about 10 minutes, then transfer to a bowl.
3. Steam beans until just tender, about 6 minutes, then transfer to the same bowl as the potatoes.
Vegetables can be steamed ahead of time and chilled before use.
4. Bring vegetables to room temperature before proceeding.
5. In a large bowl, whisk together miso paste, citrus juices, oil, and vinegar.
6. Add steamed vegetables, parsley, and peperoncini; toss well.
7. Season salad with salt if necessary.
